summary: Adds config-backed snippet commands for reusable pipelines, hardens batch concurrency tests with deterministic synctest coverage, and improves ASCII chart value label consistency.
highlights: New snippet command family: snippet set, list, get, run, and delete
Snippet entries are stored in config.json with structured fields cmd and optional desc
snippet set enforces a 10-snippet cap and validates snippet names and empty commands
snippet list now displays NAME and DESCRIPTION for a compact local snippet catalog
Legacy string-based snippet entries in config.json are still readable through backward-compatible parsing
Horizontal ASCII bar chart values now render with fixed two-decimal labels (for example 59.00)
batchGetObs and batchGetSeries now have deterministic synctest coverage for concurrency caps, order, warnings, and fallback behavior
Batch concurrency integration test no longer relies on time.Sleep and now uses deterministic request gating
Added Snippet Contracts integration section to verify snippet CLI help surface and core command behavior
update_instructions: Download the latest release from the GitHub releases page or rerun the install script from download.reservecli.dev.
